name: 13 · Resource Pool (GPU contention)
description: Reference pattern for CONTENDED infrastructure on the event-sourced Petri substrate — resources are places, claims are tokens. Admission folds into deploymentModel: create a `token_pool` RESOURCE at /resources (capacity N), then set the 'GPU Render' step's deploymentModel to { mode: "inline", pool: { alias: "<your-pool>" } }. mekhan auto-deploys the pool's backing net `pool-<id>`; the compiler wraps the body behind a claim/grant/release against it. Launch K instances against the N-unit pool: exactly N run while the rest queue in the pool's claim_inbox (admission control = the firing rule), each release frees a slot for a waiter, and the granted typed lease (`lease.unit_id`) is body-visible. Money shot: inject `lease_expired` for a stuck grant_id to reap a crashed holder and watch the freed unit get re-granted. Seeded here as plain inline (the demo seeder provisions templates, not resources) — the live pool showcase is an R5 dogfood step. See docs/14-resource-pool-net-design.md.
